name: Coffin Contract Cloister
identity: A public contracting cloister where family means, ritual promise, and afterlife status are translated into binding service.
approach: Polished stone counters and carved niche-coffins frame the entry.
inside: Quiet bargaining benches stand beside shrines, witness tables, and ledger alcoves.
expected_behavior: treat the dead and the ledger seriously
faith: faith and transaction are inseparable here
seasonal_change: Pilgrimage weeks turn solemnity into managed congestion.
